properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.api-key
properties.description: Azure OpenAI API key. From the Azure AI OpenAI `Keys and Endpoint` section under `Resource Management`.

properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Azure OpenAI chat client.

properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Azure OpenAI embedding client.

properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.endpoint
properties.description: Azure OpenAI API endpoint. From the Azure AI OpenAI `Keys and Endpoint` section under `Resource Management`.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.anthropic.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Anthropic chat client. Disabled by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.anthropic.chat.model
properties.description: The generative id to use. See the {@link AnthropicChatModel} for the supported models.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.aws.access-key
properties.description: AWS access key.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.aws.region
properties.description: AWS region to use. Defaults to us-east-1.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.aws.secret-key
properties.description: AWS secret key.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.cohere.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Cohere Chat Client. False by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.cohere.chat.model
properties.description: Bedrock Cohere Chat generative name. Defaults to 'cohere-command-v14'.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.cohere.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Cohere Embedding Client. False by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.cohere.embedding.model
properties.description: Bedrock Cohere Embedding generative name. Defaults to 'cohere.embed-multilingual-v3'.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.llama2.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Llama2 chat client. Disabled by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.llama2.chat.model
properties.description: The generative id to use. See the {@link Llama2ChatModel} for the supported models.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.titan.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Titan Chat Client. False by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.titan.chat.model
properties.description: Bedrock Titan Chat generative name. Defaults to 'amazon.titan-text-express-v1'.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.titan.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Titan Embedding Client. False by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.titan.embedding.input-type
properties.description: Titan Embedding API input types. Could be either text or image (encoded in base64). Defaults to {@link InputType#IMAGE}.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.titan.embedding.model
properties.description: Bedrock Titan Embedding generative name. Defaults to 'amazon.titan-embed-image-v1'.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.cache.directory
properties.description: Resource cache directory. Used to cache remote resources, such as the ONNX models, to the local file system. Applicable only for cache.enabled == true. Defaults to {java.io.tmpdir}/spring-ai-onnx-generative.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.cache.enabled
properties.description: Enable the Resource caching.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.enabled
properties.description: Enable the Transformer Embedding client.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.metadata-mode
properties.description: Specifies what parts of the {@link Document}'s content and metadata will be used for computing the embeddings. Applicable for the {@link TransformersEmbeddingClient#embed(Document)} method only. Has no effect on the {@link TransformersEmbeddingClient#embed(String)} or {@link TransformersEmbeddingClient#embed(List)}. Defaults to {@link MetadataMode#NONE}.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.onnx.gpu-device-id
properties.description: Run on a GPU or with another provider (optional). https://onnxruntime.ai/docs/get-started/with-java.html#run-on-a-gpu-or-with-another-provider-optional The GPU device ID to execute on. Only applicable if >= 0. Ignored otherwise.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.onnx.model-output-name
properties.description: Defaults to: 'last_hidden_state'.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.onnx.model-uri
properties.description: Existing, pre-trained ONNX generative. Commonly exported from https://sbert.net/docs/pretrained_models.html. Defaults to sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.tokenizer.uri
properties.description: URI of a pre-trained HuggingFaceTokenizer created by the ONNX engine (e.g. tokenizer.json).

properties.name: spring.ai.huggingface.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Huggingface chat client.

properties.name: spring.ai.mistralai.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable OpenAI chat client.

properties.name: spring.ai.mistralai.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable MistralAI embedding client.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.base-url
properties.description: Base URL where Ollama API server is running.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Ollama chat client.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Ollama embedding client.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable OpenAI chat client.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable OpenAI embedding client.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.image.enabled
properties.description: Enable OpenAI Image client.

properties.name: spring.ai.postgresml.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Postgres ML embedding client.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.backoff.initial-interval
properties.description: Initial sleep duration.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.backoff.max-interval
properties.description: Maximum backoff duration.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.backoff.multiplier
properties.description: Backoff interval multiplier.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.exclude-on-http-codes
properties.description: List of HTTP status codes that should not trigger a retry (e.g. throw NonTransientAiException).

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of retry attempts.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.on-client-errors
properties.description: If false, throw a NonTransientAiException, and do not attempt retry for 4xx client error codes. False by default. If true, throw a TransientAiException, and attempt retry for 4xx client.

properties.name: spring.ai.stabilityai.image.enabled
properties.description: Enable Stability Image client.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.ca-pem-path
properties.description: The ca.pem path for tls two-way authentication, only takes effect when "secure" is True.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.client-key-path
properties.description: The client.key path for tls two-way authentication, only takes effect when "secure" is True.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.client-pem-path
properties.description: The client.pem path for tls two-way authentication, only takes effect when "secure" is True.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: Connection timeout value of client channel. The timeout value must be greater than zero.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.host
properties.description: Milvus host name/address.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.idle-timeout-ms
properties.description: Idle timeout value of client channel. The timeout value must be larger than zero.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.keep-alive-time-ms
properties.description: Keep-alive time value of client channel. The keep-alive value must be greater than zero.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.keep-alive-timeout-ms
properties.description: The keep-alive timeout value of client channel. The timeout value must be greater than zero.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.password
properties.description: The password for this connection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.port
properties.description: Milvus the connection port. Value must be greater than zero and less than 65536.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.rpc-deadline-ms
properties.description: Deadline for how long you are willing to wait for a reply from the server. With a deadline setting, the client will wait when encounter fast RPC fail caused by network fluctuations. The deadline value must be larger than or equal to zero. Default value is 0, deadline is disabled.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.secure
properties.description: Secure the authorization for this connection, set to True to enable TLS.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.server-name
properties.description: Sets the target name override for SSL host name checking, only takes effect when "secure" is True. Note: this value is passed to grpc.ssl_target_name_override

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.server-pem-path
properties.description: server.pem path for tls one-way authentication, only takes effect when "secure" is True.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.token
properties.description: Token serving as the key for identification and authentication purposes.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.uri
properties.description: The uri of Milvus instance

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.username
properties.description: The username and password for this connection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.collection-name
properties.description: Milvus collection name to store the vectors.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.database-name
properties.description: The name of the Milvus database to connect to.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.embedding-dimension
properties.description: The dimension of the vectors to be stored in the Milvus collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.index-parameters
properties.description: The index parameters to be used for the Milvus collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.index-type
properties.description: The type of the index to be created for the Milvus collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.metric-type
properties.description: The metric type to be used for the Milvus collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.api-key
properties.description: The API key to use for authentication with the Qdrant server.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.collection-name
properties.description: The name of the collection to use in Qdrant.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.host
properties.description: The host of the Qdrant server.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.port
properties.description: The port of the Qdrant server.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.use-tls
properties.description: Whether to use TLS(HTTPS). Defaults to false.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.weaviate.filter-field
properties.description: spring.ai.vectorstore.weaviate.filter-field.<field-name>=<field-type>

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.api-key
properties.description: Vertex AI PaLM API access key.

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.base-url
properties.description: Vertex AI PaLM API base URL. Defaults to https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta3

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Vertex AI PaLM API chat client.

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.chat.model
properties.description: Vertex AI PaLM API generative name. Defaults to chat-bison-001

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.chat.options
properties.description: Vertex AI PaLM API generative options.

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Vertex AI PaLM API embedding client.

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.embedding.model
properties.description: Vertex AI PaLM API embedding generative name. Defaults to embedding-gecko-001.

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.gemini.chat.options
properties.description: Vertex AI Gemini API generative options.

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.gemini.credentials-uri
properties.description: URI to Vertex AI Gemini credentials (optional)

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.gemini.location
properties.description: Vertex AI Gemini location.

properties.name: spring.ai.vertex.ai.gemini.project-id
properties.description: Vertex AI Gemini project ID.
